summary: Conjecture 1.5 from arXiv:2511.07601 asks whether the unique maximal Schnyder wood of the UIHPT is the weak limit of maximal Schnyder woods of uniformly random triangulations from T^m_n as n → ∞ then m → ∞. The paper establishes the analogous result for fixed boundary length m (Theorem 1.2) but was unable to pass to the m → ∞ limit. No follow-up paper resolving this conjecture was found in searches covering the period through May 2026; the conjecture is less than six months old and almost certainly still open.
search_queries: Schnyder wood UIHPT weak limit triangulation Addario-Berry 2025 conjecture
UIHPT Schnyder wood convergence maximal triangulation 2026 Addario-Berry Hogan Michel Scott
notes: No follow-up found after 4 web calls (1 WebFetch + 3 WebSearch). The conjecture was posted November 2025; as of May 2026 it is very recent. The source paper proves the fixed-m case (Theorem 1.2) and leaves the double limit (n → ∞ then m → ∞) as this open conjecture.
